Petition For Surcharge, Accounting, Return Of Trust Property, And Redress Of Breach Of Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Sections 850 And 17200
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Aug-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frank Cialone for Rufina Lee
Jennifer Jonak for Anthony Lee via Court Call

Mr. Cialone stated that he is likely to withdraw the petition to compel records, counsel have been cooperative, that parties will go back to mediation for the petition to surcharge his client will need to come from New York for the mediation, and requested 6-8 week continuance. Ms. Jonak also requested 8-week continuance. The Court instructed counsel to notify the court as soon as possible if they intend to withdraw the petition to compel.
The Petition for Surcharge, etc., and Petition to Compel Co-Trustee to Transfer Trust Records are continued to August 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
